Education Volunteer: Help design and deliver educational content, tutor children, and conduct interactive learning sessions for underprivileged students.
Fundraising Volunteer: Assist in planning, organizing, and executing fundraising campaigns, donor outreach programs, and crowdsourcing activities.
Social Media Volunteer: Manage social media handles, design engaging posts, plan campaigns, and improve digital footprint.
Content Creator: Write newsletters, blog posts, press releases, and script content for videos to tell story to the world.
Event Management Volunteer: Co-ordinate and execute ground events, workshops, donation drives, and volunteer meetups.
Community Outreach Volunteer: Liaise with local communities, raise awareness about social issues, and build networks of volunteers and partners.
Technical Volunteer: Develop, maintain, and optimize web platforms, databases, and software applications.
